description_for_human: Look up pet microchip numbers and register pets for free. Search across US, European, and UK databases.
description_for_model: Look up pet microchip registration status. Use GET /api/lookup?chip=NUMBER to check if a 9-15 digit microchip number is registered. Returns pet info (name, species, breed) if found. Use GET /api/lookup/external?chip=NUMBER to get links to check international databases (AAHA US/Canada, Europetnet Europe, Check-a-Chip UK). Owner contact info is never returned.
